error.teacher_advice_ch: 可以先列出過這兩點線段的方程式，slope = ( (17+ 2 / 3) - (12+ 2 / 3) ) / ( 7 - 15 ) = (- 5 / 8) y = mx + b = > 12 +2 / 3 = - 15 * 5 / 8 + b = > b = 1，得到線段為 y = - 75 x / 8 + 22，要使x和y皆為整數且x再7<x<15，x只可為8，因此答案為1
error.teacher_advice_en:
First, write the equation of the line segment passing through the two points. The slope is:

$$m = \frac{(17+2/3) - (12+2/3)}{(7 - 15)} = -\frac{5}{8}$$

The equation of the line is:

$$y = mx + b$$

Substituting the slope and one of the points, we get:

$$12 + 2/3 = -15 * 5/8 + b$$

$$b = 1$$

So the equation of the line segment is:

$$y = -\frac{75}{8}x + 22$$

To find the integer points on the line segment, we need to find the values of x that make y an integer. Since x is between 7 and 15, the only integer value of x that makes y an integer is x = 8.

Therefore, there is **1** integer point on the line segment between (15, 12 2/3) and (7, 17 2/3).

error.teacher_advice_en: 20 seconds is the time taken by the train to cross the person moving in the same direction, and 18 seconds is the time taken by the train to cross the person moving in the opposite direction. Subtracting these two values directly will not give the time they will meet. First, we need to find the speed of the train, the speed of the first person, and the speed of the second person. Let's assume the speed of the train is t, the speed of the first person is f, and the speed of the second person is s. We can set up an equation: 20 ( t - f ) = 18 ( t + s ). We can then solve this equation to find the time they will meet.

error.teacher_advice_en: The equation is incorrect. The left side of the equation is 3, while the right side is multiplied by 4, resulting in an unequal equation. To correct this, first convert c to a: 6a = 3a + 3c => c = a. Then substitute the value of c into 6a = 4b + 4c => 6a = 4b + 4a => a = 2b. Therefore, a's speed is twice that of b, and b will take 12 days to complete the work alone.

error.teacher_advice_en: Alternatively, you can factor the equation in a different way to help your students find the answer. Let x = b^2, then 4x^2 - 41x + 100 = 0 => 4x^2 - 16x - 25x + 100 = 0 => (4x - 25)(x - 4) = 0. From this, we can find that the two roots of x are 25/4 and 4, so the roots of b are 5/2 and 2. The sum of the two roots is 2.5 + 2 = 4.5.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 方程式假設錯誤，要解出這題，我們可以假設s為火車原速度，t為原花費時間，建立2方程式，(s+4)*(t-1/2)=(s-2)(t+1/3)，化簡可得5s-36t+8=0 -(1)，(s+4)*(t-1/2)=st，化簡可得-s+8t-4=0，乘5得到-5s+40t-20=0 -(2)，(1)+(2)可得4t=12，t=3，帶回(2)得出x=20，因此原距離為3*20=60
error.teacher_advice_en: The equation assumption is wrong. To solve this problem, we can assume s as the original speed of the train, and t as the original time spent. We can establish 2 equations: (s+4)*(t-1/2)=(s-2)(t+1/3), which can be simplified to 5s-36t+8=0 -(1), and (s+4)*(t-1/2)=st, which can be simplified to -s+8t-4=0. Multiplying by 5, we get -5s+40t-20=0 -(2). Adding (1) and (2), we get 4t=12, so t=3. Substituting this back into (2), we get x=20. Therefore, the original distance is 3*20=60.

The correct calculation method is as follows: Assuming the time spent on the outbound trip is x, the total distance is 66x, and the average speed is 66x*2/(1+2)x.

the_reason_why_student_cant_solve_en: Difficulty in finding the remainder of large numbers

error.teacher_advice_en: When finding the remainder of a large number, it can be helpful to break down the exponent before calculating. In this case, 12 ^ 190 = ((12 ^ 3) ^ 63) * 12. First, calculate 12 ^ 3 = 1728. The remainder when 1728 is divided by 1729 is -1. This remainder can be rewritten as (-1 ^ 63) * 12. Therefore, the remainder is -12 = 1729 - 12 = 1717.

student_process: \begin{aligned} & \left\{\begin{aligned} z+b & =\frac{3}{25} \text { ( hour per widget) } \\ z-b & =\frac{2}{20} \\ 2 z & =\frac{3}{25}+\frac{3}{20} \\ & =\frac{12+15}{100}=\frac{27}{100} \\ z & =\frac{27}{200} \\ \frac{27}{200} \times 40 & =\frac{27}{5} \text { hours } \end{aligned}\right. \end{aligned}

error.teacher_advice_ch: 方程式假設錯誤，依照同學的假設，z和b為該機器生成一個零件所需的時間，由於機器一起工作，3小時內可以製作25個小部件，但同學假設的方程式z+b=3/25，涵義為z和b各生產25個零件的時間和為3小時，與題意不符導致錯誤，正確應為3/z+3/b=25=>3z+3b=25bz，以b=z-2/20帶入後計算即可得出z=3/10，因次答案為3/10*40=12
error.teacher_advice_en: The equation you have assumed is incorrect. According to your assumption, z and b represent the time it takes for the respective machines to produce one widget. Since the machines are working together, they can produce 25 widgets in 3 hours. However, the equation you have assumed, z + b = 3/25, implies that the time it takes for z and b to produce 25 widgets each is 3 hours, which is not consistent with the problem statement. This leads to an incorrect result. The correct equation should be 3/z + 3/b = 25, which can be simplified to 3z + 3b = 25bz. Substituting b = z - 2/20 into this equation, we can solve for z and obtain z = 3/10. Therefore, the answer should be 3/10 * 40 = 12.
The smallest number in the set is 5 (8*0+5). Therefore, the 72nd number should be 5*(72-1)+5=573.

error.error_equation: $$ \begin{aligned} & \because \quad 20 \rightarrow 1 \& 39,2 \& 38,3 \& 37 ; \cdots 17 \& 23, \\ & 18 \& 22,19 \& 21 \Rightarrow 2 \times 19=38 \text { numbers } \\ & 19 \rightarrow 1 \& 37,2 \& 36,3 \& 35, \cdots 16 \& 22,17 \& 21, \\ & 18 \& 20 \Rightarrow 2 \times 18=36 \text { numbers } \end{aligned} $$ $\therefore 20$ has the greatest number of distinct rhyming prime around it.
error.teacher_advice_ch: 同學將所有整數都納入計算導致錯誤，要求出distinct rhyming primes的數量需先了1~40有那些數字是質數，再來尋找哪個數的distinct rhyming primes數量最多，其中每組rhyming primes的數值必須為質數
error.teacher_advice_en: The student's error is in considering all integers. To find the number of distinct rhyming primes, one must first find all the prime numbers between 1 and 40. Then, one must find which number has the greatest number of distinct rhyming primes. Each pair of rhyming primes must be prime numbers.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 一題有五個選項，因此有五種作答方式，同學使用階層方式計算是錯的，總共有四題，要計算所有的作答方始應該要將每題的作答方式相成，而不是只有乘以4，因此正確應為：5^4=625
error.teacher_advice_en: Each question has five answer choices, so there are five ways to answer each question. The student's hierarchical calculation is incorrect. There are four questions, so to calculate all the ways to answer the test, the number of ways to answer each question should be multiplied together, not just multiplied by 4. Therefore, the correct answer should be: 5^4 = 625.

You can assume an unknown variable to calculate it. Let x be the original amount of gasoline the driver bought. Let y be the new amount of gasoline the driver should buy. error.teacher_advice_en: The concept of calculating the average speed is incorrect. Since the time spent on the outward and return journeys is different, the speeds of the outward and return journeys cannot be directly added and divided by 2. The time spent on each journey must be calculated first.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 解題觀念錯誤， 42 公里/小時的速度行駛的火車在 9 秒內超越了同向騎行的人。如果騎自行車的人朝相反方向行駛，火車將在5秒內從他身邊經過，並不代表火車長度為火車7秒鐘行駛的距離，正確計算方法應為：let the length of the train be x meter and the speed of the cyclist is y m / s now when the train and the cyclist are in the same direction , the relative speed is : ( 35 / 3 - y ) m / s [ converting 42 km / h to m / s - 35 / 3 m / s ] now distance / relative speed = 9 seconds substituting the values , we get x + 9 y. . . ( 1 ) similarly calculate the relative speed when they are in the opposite direction the relative speed is ( 35 / 3 + y ) now distance / relative speed is equivalent to 5 seconds substituting the values , we get the equation 3 x - 15 y = 175 . . . ( 2 ) solving ( 1 ) and ( 2 ) , we get x = 75 meters
error.teacher_advice_en: There's a misconception in solving this problem. Just because a train traveling at 42 km/h overtakes a cyclist going in the same direction in 9 seconds and would pass a cyclist going in the opposite direction in 5 seconds, it doesn't mean the train's length equals the distance it travels in 7 seconds. The correct method to calculate this involves setting up the following equations: Let the length of the train be x meters, and the speed of the cyclist be y m/s. When the train and the cyclist are moving in the same direction, the relative speed is (35/3 - y) m/s [converting 42 km/h to m/s gives 35/3 m/s]. Using distance divided by relative speed equals time, for 9 seconds, substituting these values gives x + 9y = 105... (1). Similarly, calculate the relative speed when they are in opposite directions. The relative speed then is (35/3 + y). Now using distance divided by relative speed equals time for 5 seconds, substituting these values gives 3x - 15y = 175... (2). Solving equations (1) and (2), we find x = 75 meters.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 同學解題的思路錯誤，可以先將32質因數分解，得知32=2^5，因為n(n+1)總是偶數*奇數或奇數*偶數的偶數乘積，所以它能被2整除的機率為1，它被4整除的機率為1 / 2 ，以此類推來計算能被32整除的機率。
error.teacher_advice_en: The student's approach to solving the problem is incorrect. First, factor 32 into its prime factors: 32 = 2^5. Since n(n+1) is always the product of an even number and an odd number, or an odd number and an even number, it is always even. Therefore, the probability that it is divisible by 2 is 1. The probability that it is divisible by 4 is 1/2, and so on. Use this to calculate the probability that it is divisible by 32.

the_reason_why_student_cant_solve_ch: 不會對這麼大的數求餘數
the_reason_why_student_cant_solve_en: Difficulty in finding the remainder of large numbers

error.teacher_advice_en: When finding the remainder of a large number, it can be helpful to break down the exponent before calculating. In this case, 12 ^ 190 = ((12 ^ 3) ^ 63) * 12. First, calculate 12 ^ 3 = 1728. The remainder when 1728 is divided by 1729 is -1. This remainder can be rewritten as (-1 ^ 63) * 12. Therefore, the remainder is -12 = 1729 - 12 = 1717.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 計算a-b>0時三角形面積的方式錯誤，a-b>0代表三角形在x=y線下的面積，也就是 ( 1 / 2 ) ( 4 ) ( 4 ) = 8
error.teacher_advice_en: The teacher's suggestion is that the calculation of the area when a-b>0 is incorrect. a-b>0 represents the area of the triangle below the line x=y, which is (1/2) * (4) * (4) = 8.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 錯誤計算圓錐的體積，計算圓錐體機的公式為1/3*底面積*高，同學少乘了圓錐的高，此圓錐的高為底面半徑的四倍，正確式子為1/3*(x^2*pi)*4x
error.teacher_advice_en: The student made a mistake in calculating the volume of the ice cream cone. The formula for the volume of a cone is 1/3 * base area * height. The student forgot to multiply by the height of the cone, which is four times the radius of its base. The correct formula should be 1/3 * (x^2 * pi) * 4x.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 觀念錯誤，金屬板只需用在水箱的六個面，因此應求區每個面的面積，再來計算金屬板的用量，而不是拿總體積來計算，水箱的每面面積為1000=10^3，10*10=100因此金屬板用量為100/8*6=75
error.teacher_advice_en: The concept is incorrect. The metal sheets are only used for the six surfaces of the tank. Therefore, you should calculate the area of each surface and then calculate the number of metal sheets required, instead of using the total volume. The area of each surface is 1000 = 10^3, 10*10 = 100. Therefore, the number of metal sheets required is 100/8*6 = 75.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 若要面積保持不變，矩形的長度減少了15%，若寬度不變則整體面積變為(1-15%)=85%，因此寬度需變為100%/85%才維持面積不變，而不是120%/85%，正確的寬度增加比例為100/85-100=17.6%
error.teacher_advice_en: To maintain the original area, if the length of the rectangle is reduced by 15%, then the area becomes (1-15%) = 85%. Therefore, the width needs to be increased to 100%/85% to maintain the same area, not 120%/85%. The correct percentage increase in width is 100/85-100 = 17.6%.

the_reason_why_student_cant_solve_en: Difficulty in finding the remainder of large numbers

error.teacher_advice_en: When finding the remainder of a large number, it can be helpful to break down the exponent before calculating. In this case, 12 ^ 190 = ((12 ^ 3) ^ 63) * 12. First, calculate 12 ^ 3 = 1728. The remainder when 1728 is divided by 1729 is -1. This remainder can be rewritten as (-1 ^ 63) * 12. Therefore, the remainder is -12 = 1729 - 12 = 1717.

error.teacher_advice_en: The equation is incorrect. According to the student's assumption, for every two registered voters who have a favorable impression only of party b, there is one registered voter who has a favorable impression of both parties. Therefore, the number of registered voters who have a favorable impression of both parties should be 0.5x, not x. The correct equation should be: x + 0.5x + 20 + 35 = 100

error.teacher_advice_ch: 使用錯誤的方式計算導致錯誤，正確的方式為：area of triangle is 1 / 2 * 12 * 8 = 48 side of square = x the entire triangle split into two right angled triangle and one square with dimensions as follows i ) square with side x ii ) right angled triangle with perpendicular sides x and 12 - x iii ) right angled triangle with perpendicular sides 8 - x and x sum of area of all three = 48 = x 2 + 1 / 2 * x * ( 12 - x ) + 1 / 2 * x * ( 8 - x ) = 48 = x = 4.8 cm
error.teacher_advice_en:
The incorrect method of calculation has led to an incorrect answer. The correct method is as follows:

Area of triangle is 1 / 2 * 12 * 8 = 48
Side of square = x
The entire triangle split into two right angled triangle and one square with dimensions as follows
i) square with side x
ii) right angled triangle with perpendicular sides x and 12 - x
iii) right angled triangle with perpendicular sides 8 - x and x
Sum of area of all three = 48
= x^2 + 1 / 2 * x * (12 - x) + 1 / 2 * x * (8 - x) = 48
= x = 4.8 cm

error.teacher_advice_ch: 學生沒有理解真實折扣的意義，真實折扣是未到期時間現值(present value)的單利，因此需先計算出未到期時間的現值2160-360=1800，而360是該值的單利，從而計算出單利的利率(360/1800)後再計算票據面值(face value)未到期時間的單利便可得出banker’s discount
error.teacher_advice_en: The student has not understood the meaning of true discount. True discount is the simple interest on the present value of the bill for the unexpired period. So, first we need to calculate the present value of the bill for the unexpired period, which is 2160 - 360 = 1800. Now, 360 is the simple interest on this value. From this, we can calculate the rate of simple interest (360/1800) and then calculate the simple interest on the face value of the bill for the unexpired period to get the banker's discount.

the_reason_why_student_cant_solve_en: Difficulty in finding the remainder of large numbers

error.teacher_advice_en: When finding the remainder of a large number, it can be helpful to break down the exponent before calculating. In this case, 12 ^ 190 = ((12 ^ 3) ^ 63) * 12. First, calculate 12 ^ 3 = 1728. The remainder when 1728 is divided by 1729 is -1. This remainder can be rewritten as (-1 ^ 63) * 12. Therefore, the remainder is -12 = 1729 - 12 = 1717.

error.teacher_advice_en:
To find the man's rate, simply dividing the downstream speed by the upstream speed is incorrect. Instead, we can use variables to represent the water current and the man's speed. Let x be the water current speed and y be the man's speed. Then, we have the following equations:

x + y = 6 (downstream speed)
y - x = 2 (upstream speed)

Solving these equations will give us the value of y, which represents the man's speed.

error.teacher_advice_en: When finding the remainder of a large number, it can be helpful to break down the exponent before calculating. In this case, 12 ^ 190 = ((12 ^ 3) ^ 63) * 12. First, calculate 12 ^ 3 = 1728. The remainder when 1728 is divided by 1729 is -1. This remainder can be rewritten as (-1 ^ 63) * 12. Therefore, the remainder is -12 = 1729 - 12 = 1717.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 分潤的比例是由付出的金額乘上時間計算出的，因此不能直接以a的投資金額來乘上分潤比例，要算出a的投資金額乘式時間再用分潤比例推出b的投資金額
error.teacher_advice_en: The ratio of profit sharing is calculated by multiplying the amount invested by the time period. Therefore, you cannot directly multiply A's investment amount by the profit sharing ratio. You need to calculate A's investment amount multiplied by the time period and then use the profit sharing ratio to derive B's investment amount.

error.teacher_advice_en:
The problem is misunderstood. It takes 4 hours for the man to swim downstream and 4 hours to swim upstream, not 4 hours in total. Therefore, the correct equation is:

28/(x+9) + 16/(x-9) = 4+4 => x=5.5

error.teacher_advice_en: When finding the remainder of a large number, it can be helpful to break down the exponent before calculating. In this case, 12 ^ 190 = ((12 ^ 3) ^ 63) * 12. First, calculate 12 ^ 3 = 1728. The remainder when 1728 is divided by 1729 is -1. This remainder can be rewritten as (-1 ^ 63) * 12. Therefore, the remainder is -12 = 1729 - 12 = 1717.

error.teacher_advice_en: The question asks how far the thief will run before being caught. Therefore, after calculating how long it will take for the thief to be caught, you need to multiply the number of seconds by the thief's speed to calculate the distance.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 這題考的是等比數列，等比數列和的公式為Sn=(a1(1-r^n))/(1-r)，Sn為總和，a1為首項，r為公比，因此正確計算方法為first time distance is h second time 80 h / 100 = 4 h / 5 similarly third time 80 % of 4 h / 5 = h ( 4 ^ 2 ) / ( 5 ^ 2 ) and so on . . . this will lead to infinite terms of geometric progression i . e h + 2 * 4 h / 5 + 2 * 16 h / 25 . . . . . . . . . . . . sum = h + 2 * 4 h / ( 5 ( 1 - 4 / 5 ) ) = 9 h answer : d
error.teacher_advice_en: This question tests geometric progression. The formula for the sum of a geometric progression is Sn=(a1(1-r^n))/(1-r), where Sn is the sum, a1 is the first term, and r is the common ratio. Therefore, the correct calculation method is: first time distance is h second time 80 h / 100 = 4 h / 5 similarly third time 80 % of 4 h / 5 = h ( 4 ^ 2 ) / ( 5 ^ 2 ) and so on . . . this will lead to infinite terms of geometric progression i . e h + 2 * 4 h / 5 + 2 * 16 h / 25 . . . . . . . . . . . . sum = h + 2 * 4 h / ( 5 ( 1 - 4 / 5 ) ) = 9 h answer : d

student_process: Assume the number of travelers checks in $\$ 50$ is $\chi_{\text {. }}$ $$ \begin{aligned} & 50 \cdot x+100(30-x)=1800 \\ & \Rightarrow 50 x+1000-100 x=1800 \\ & \Rightarrow 50 x=3000-1800=1200 \\ & \Rightarrow x=1200 \div 50=24 \end{aligned} $$ $30-24=6 \Rightarrow$ the number of checks in $\$ 100$  Assume he spend $y$ checks in \$50 $$ \begin{aligned} & \frac{(24-y) \cdot 50+6 \cdot 100}{(24-y+6)}=75 \\ & \Rightarrow 1200-50 y+600=2250-75 y \\ & \Rightarrow 25 y=2250-1800=450 \\ & \Rightarrow y=450 \div 25=18 \end{aligned} $$

error.teacher_advice_ch: 方程式建立錯誤，兩台機器在 3 天內一起生產 5 w / 4 個小部件，正確列式應為((5/4)*w)/((w/t)+(w/t+2))=3=>(5/4)/(1/t+1/(t+2))=3=>1/t+1/(t+2) =5/12=>t=4，因此機器x需4+2=6天來生產w 個小部件，生成6w個小部件需要6*6=36天
error.teacher_advice_en:
The equation is set up incorrectly. The two machines together produce 5 w / 4 widgets in 3 days, so the correct equation should be:

((5/4)*w)/((w/t)+(w/(t+2))=3

=>(5/4)/(1/t+1/(t+2))=3

=>1/t+1/(t+2) =5/12

=>t=4

Therefore, machine x would take 4+2=6 days to produce w widgets. To produce 6w widgets, it would take 6*6=36 days.

the_reason_why_student_cant_solve_ch: 不會對這麼大的數求餘數
the_reason_why_student_cant_solve_en: Difficulty in finding the remainder of large numbers

error.teacher_advice_en: When finding the remainder of a large number, it can be helpful to break down the exponent before calculating. In this case, 12 ^ 190 = ((12 ^ 3) ^ 63) * 12. First, calculate 12 ^ 3 = 1728. The remainder when 1728 is divided by 1729 is -1. This remainder can be rewritten as (-1 ^ 63) * 12. Therefore, the remainder is -12 = 1729 - 12 = 1717.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 計算比例的方式錯誤，題目敘述：20%僅通過一個主題，25%僅通過兩個主題。如果24%的學生只通過了4個題目中的機率為剩餘80%學生中的機率，不為所有學生的比例，因此還需將上述機率成上80%才可得出正確答案
error.teacher_advice_en: The calculation of the percentage is incorrect. The question states that 20% passed only one topic and 25% passed only two topics. If 24% of the students passed only 4 topics, this percentage is out of the remaining 80% of students who did not pass all 5 topics, not out of all students. Therefore, the above percentages need to be multiplied by 80% to get the correct answer.

error.teacher_advice_ch: 錯誤計算溶液體積，溶液總體積假設錯誤，水蒸發了1/4而鹽保持不變，因此正確的體積應為0.8x*3/4+0.2x+20+40，不可只使用水的體積來計算，因此正確計算方式為(0.2x+40)/(0.8x*3/4+0.2x+20+40)=1/3 =>0.8x+60=0.6x+120=>0.2x=60 x=300
error.teacher_advice_en: The teacher suggests that the student has made an error in calculating the volume of the solution. The total volume of the solution is assumed to be incorrect. When 1/4 of the water evaporates, the salt remains unchanged. Therefore, the correct volume should be 0.8x*3/4+0.2x+20+40. It is incorrect to calculate using only the volume of water. Therefore, the correct calculation method is (0.2x+40)/(0.8x*3/4+0.2x+20+40)=1/3 =>0.8x+60=0.6x+120=>0.2x=60 x=300

error.teacher_advice_ch: 計算方式錯誤，正確過程為：let the amount of money be 200 let cost of 1 orange be 4 let cost of 1 mango be 5 he decides to retain 5 % of 200 = 10 for taxi fare , so he is left with 190 he buys 20 mangoes so he spends 100 money left is 90 ( 190 - 100 ) no of oranges he can buy = 90 / 4 = > 22,5 so , george can buy 20 oranges
error.teacher_advice_en:
The calculation method is incorrect. The correct process is as follows:

Let the amount of money be 200
Let the cost of 1 orange be 4
Let the cost of 1 mango be 5

He decides to retain 5% of 200 = 10 for taxi fare, so he is left with 190
He buys 20 mangoes so he spends 100
Money left is 90 (190 - 100)
Number of oranges he can buy = 90 / 4 = 22.5

Therefore, George can buy 22 oranges.

Since each ball must be larger than the previous one, (10×9×8) can be used to select three different balls. The order of a, b, and c can be as follows: - (i) a>b>c. (ii) a>c>b. (iii) b>c>a. (iv) b>a>c. (v) c>a>b. (vi) c>b>a. They occur the same number of times. Therefore, the number of ways for (a > b > c) is: - = > 1 / 6 x 10 x 9 x 8. = > 120, the correct answer is 120/(10*10*10)

error.teacher_advice_en:
The student has made an error in calculating the area of the gravel path. The correct method is to calculate the area of the entire rectangular grassy plot and then subtract the area of the plot excluding the gravel path to obtain the area of the gravel path.

Area of the plot = 110 m * 65 m = 7150 sq. m
Area of plot excluding gravel = 105 m * 60 m = 6300 sq. m
Area of gravel = 7150 sq. m - 6300 sq. m = 850 sq. m
Cost of building it = 850 sq. m * 30 = 25500 p
In rs = 25500 / 100 = rs 255

error.teacher_advice_ch: 沒有考慮到各個情形出現機率不同導致錯誤，當骰子數為1,2,3,4,5,6時，3^s的值分別為9,81,6261,729,9,81，因此9和81出現的機率2/6為其他值的機率為1/6，將同學所找出的解計算出發生的機率後計算機率總合即可得出答案，解1的機率為2/6*2/6=4/36，解2的機率為1/6*2/6=2/36，解3的機率為1/6*2/6=2/36，解4的機率為1/6*2/6=2/36，解5的機率為1/6*2/6=2/36，解6的機率為1/6*1/6=1/36，總和(1/36)*1+(2/36)*4+(4/36)=13/36即為正確答案
error.teacher_advice_en: The solution does not take into account the different probabilities of each case, leading to an incorrect answer. When the dice number is 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, the values of 3^s are 9, 81, 6261, 729, 9, 81, respectively. Therefore, the probability of 9 and 81 appearing is 2/6, while the probability of other values is 1/6. By calculating the probability of each solution found by the student and summing the probabilities, the correct answer can be obtained. The probability of solution 1 is 2/6 * 2/6 = 4/36, the probability of solution 2 is 1/6 * 2/6 = 2/36, the probability of solution 3 is 1/6 * 2/6 = 2/36, the probability of solution 4 is 1/6 * 2/6 = 2/36, the probability of solution 5 is 1/6 * 2/6 = 2/36, and the probability of solution 6 is 1/6 * 1/6 = 1/36. The sum (1/36) * 1 + (2/36) * 4 + (4/36) = 13/36 is the correct answer.
